one_liner: Chat wallet where friends, funds, and AI agents share one surface. Eighteen Move modules on the Initia ori-1 MiniMove rollup. MCP + A2A + x402 for agents.
pitch_500: Ori is a chat wallet built on the Initia MiniMove rollup (ori-1). Eighteen Move modules ship everything a consumer chat app needs: send, tip, gift, stream, predict, paywall, subscribe, wager, follow, and more. Every one of those actions is also a tool on an MCP server, so Claude Desktop or any MCP client can transact with permission. An A2A JSON-RPC endpoint makes every tool callable over plain HTTP, and the paywall module speaks x402. An on-chain agent_policy module enforces per-agent daily caps and a kill switch the user controls from any device. Prediction markets resolve by Connect oracle across all pairs the rollup tracks — no counterparty required. The whole stack runs free-tier on Vercel + Supabase + Upstash.

auto_signing.notes: InterwovenKit session keys grant 24h transacting for /initia.move.v1.MsgExecute, covering every user action.

sponsored_onboarding.notes: New users get a small seed grant + sponsored .init username registration on first login.

minimove_vm.notes: Every module is Move source, compiled via minitiad move build.

opinit.notes: ori-1 settles to initiation-2 via OPinit.

connect_oracle.notes: prediction_pool markets resolve against Connect price feeds (BTC/USD, ETH/USD, SOL/USD, and 60+ other pairs the rollup tracks).

tokenomics: No token launch. Platform uses bridged INIT via Interwoven Bridge as both gas and unit of account.

verification.event_decoder_parity: Pass: packages/event-decoder (7 tests, pure TS shared by Node + Deno)
verification.move_tests: Pass: packages/contracts (Move unit tests for each module)
